chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-352 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 1618/25 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on CMA 1619/25 4.For hearing of main case. 17-03-2025 Mr. Arif Ali Abbasi, Advocate for the petitioner. ***** Through this petition, the petitioner is seeking directions to respondents (Revenue Officials) to demarcate the Government Naqabooli land, reserved for Asaish of villagers, details of which are mentioned in para-2 of memo of the petition. Learned AAG submits that the Senior Member Board of Revenue, Sindh, through Notification No.DD(E&I)-HQ/BOR/2024/302, dated 21.10.2024 has established a “Public Grievance Redressal Cell” under the aegis of the concerned Deputy Commissioner across Sindh. This Cell is mandated to address public grievances pertaining to revenue matters, including mutation entries, sale certificates, foti-khata-badal, demarcation of land, land partition, and solvency certificates. The establishment of this Cell provides an alternate, effective, and exhaustive remedy for redressal of complaints related to revenue issues. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed application(s) leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail the remedy delineated by the “Public Grievances Redressal Cell” as prescribed by the Notification. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
